display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; border-width: 1px; border-style: solid; border-color: inherit; border: 1px solid light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(transparent, rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
